import time
import functools

def timing_decorator(func):
    @functools.wraps(func)
    def wrapper(*args, **kwargs):
        start_time = time.time()
        result = func(*args, **kwargs)
        end_time = time.time()
        duration = end_time - start_time
        print(f"'{func.__name__}' took {duration:.4f} seconds to execute.")
        return result
    return wrapper
